title: Gajanan Maharaj Temple, Kanhor
tagline: Gajanan Maharaj Temple, Kanhor — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Shri Sant Gajanan Maharaj is known to most of the people in Maharashtra.
overview.description: Shri Sant Gajanan Maharaj is known to most of the people in Maharashtra. He stayed most of his life at Shegaon in Buldhana district in Maharashtra and has taken "Samadhi" there. Therefore, Shegaon has got a special significance for Maharaj and his devotees. Shegaon hosts a magnificent temple.

topPlaces.name: Badlapur
topPlaces.description: Badlapur (Marathi pronunciation: [bəd̪lapuːɾ]) is a city in the Thane district, Maharashtra state, India, and is a part of Mumbai Metropolitan Region. Badlapur is a city on the banks of Ulhas River in the Thane district of Maharashtra state in Konkan division.

topPlaces.name: Vangani
topPlaces.description: Vangani is a town in Maharashtra, India near the city of Mumbai. It is serviced by the Vangani railway station on the Central Line of the Mumbai Suburban Railway on the Mumbai-Karjat route and the MH SH 43 Highway which connects it with the Suburban Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Barvi Dam
topPlaces.description: Barvi Dam is an earthfill dam on the Barvi River near Badlapur, Thane district, in the state of Maharashtra in India.

items.note: Badlapur (Marathi pronunciation: [bəd̪lapuːɾ]) is a city in the Thane district, Maharashtra state, India, and is a part of Mumbai Metropolitan Region. Badlapur is a city on the banks of Ulhas River in the Thane district of Maharashtra state in Konkan division.

Vangani is a town in Maharashtra, India near the city of Mumbai. It is serviced by the Vangani railway station on the Central Line of the Mumbai Suburban Railway on the Mumbai-Karjat route and the MH SH 43 Highway which connects it with the Suburban Mumbai.
Barvi Dam is an earthfill dam on the Barvi River near Badlapur, Thane district, in the state of Maharashtra in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gajanan Maharaj Temple, Kanhor?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gajanan Maharaj Temple, Kanhor is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gajanan Maharaj Temple, Kanhor?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (44 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (18 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gajanan Maharaj Temple, Kanhor?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gajanan Maharaj Temple, Kanhor at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gajanan Maharaj Temple, Kanhor?
faq.a: Stays in Gajanan Maharaj Temple, Kanhor start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gajanan Maharaj Temple, Kanhor?
faq.a: The top attractions are Badlapur, Vangani, Barvi Dam.
